card.name: Hunting Talon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Studious Drifter
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you gain 2 life. Flow — {7}{U}: This creature gets +3/+3 and gains flying until end of turn. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Ashen Survivor
card.text: Vigilance This creature gets +2/+2 if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Fortemps Exemplar
card.text: Flash {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Stillglade Initiate
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token. Flow — {3}{G}: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Feathered Heritage
card.text: When this Aether enters, create a 2/2 green Bird creature token with "Whenever a land you control enters, this token gets +1/+0 until end of turn." Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mog Ensemble
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, put your choice of a +1/+1 counter or shield counter on another target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Attuned Acolyte
card.text: When this creature enters, untap up to one target nonland permanent. Flow — {3}{U}: Draw a card. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Starlit Mystic
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Cleric [/b]| Whenever this creature attacks, untap target creature you control. [b]Wizard[/b] | Whenever this creature attacks, tap target creature you don't control.

card.name: Pursy Pussy
card.text: This creature has flying while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.) When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Rampant Light
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Flow — {2}{W}, Discard this card: Draw a card. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Immolating Glare
card.text: Destroy target attacking creature.

card.name: Valiant Display
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Then if it is a Hero, put a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Aetheric Disruption
card.text: Until your next turn, target permanent loses all types and abilities and can't gain types or abilities. (It is still a permanent.) Create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Raise
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then put a shield counter on it if it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Jack of All Trades
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. Flow — {2}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Sandshore Colibri
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more Birds you control attacks, tap target creature.

card.name: Arcane Companion
card.text: When this creature enters, put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Activated abilities of permanents you control are flow abilities. (Each creature you tap while activating them pays for {1}.)

card.name: Scholasticate Tactician
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Flow — {X}{U}: This creature's base power and toughness become X/X until end of turn. X can't be 0. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Erstwhile Missionary
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Cleric[/b] | Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may untap it. It gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Do this only once each turn. [b]Wizard[/b] | {T}: Each player draws a card.

card.name: Memories of Home
card.text: Exile target creature card or planeswalker card from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of the exiled card.

card.name: Heartbound Healer
card.text: Flow — {3}{G}: Put a shield counter on another target creature you control if it doesn't already have one. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}. If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Rathefrost Thunder
card.text: Flying, first strike This creature has double strike while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Wondrous Tales
card.text: Whenever one or more counters are removed from permanents you control, you may create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token. Do this only once each turn. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Push the Crystal
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target tapped creature. • Remove all counters from target permanent.

card.name: Afflatus Solace
card.text: Look at target opponent's hand. You may exile a nonland card from it. For as long as that card remains exiled, its owner may play it, except it costs {2} more to cast.

card.name: Retrospection
card.text: You may cast this spell without paying its mana cost if a battle you control was defeated this turn. Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Benevolent Moglin
card.text: During each of your turns, you may cast a permanent spell from your graveyard while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Minfilia, Scion Antecedent
card.text: Each Hero you control enters with an additional shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Flow — {6}{W}: Each creature you control with a counter on it gets +4/+4 and gains vigilance until end of turn. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: A Hero of Light
card.text: Heroes you control can be in your party. (They replace a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, or Wizard.) [+1]: Until end of turn, this planeswalker becomes a 5/5 white Hero creature with indestructible. [0]: Create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token. [-2]: Reveal the top four cards of your library. Put all creature and planeswalker cards revealed this way into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Gysahl Glutton
card.text: As this creature enters, choose flying, vigilance, or lifelink. Other Birds you control get +1/+1 and have the chosen ability. Flying, vigilance, lifelink

card.name: Shadowlands Refuge
card.text: When this Aether enters, create X 1/1 colorless Hero creature tokens. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Realm Reborn
card.text: Exile all nonland permanents. Choose a Hero card, legendary card, or planeswalker card you own that was exiled this way. For as long as that card remains exiled, you may cast it. (You still pay its costs.)

card.name: For the Homeland
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. Its controller may amass X, where X is that permanent's mana value. (To amass X, where X, create X +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a X, where. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black X, where Army creature token first.)

card.name: Group Pose
card.text: Search your library for a Hero card, legendary card, or planeswalker card and exile it. Shuffle. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost if your enmity is twelve or greater. Otherwise, put that card into your hand. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Triple Triad // Jumbo Cactpot
card.text:
When this side is cleared, create three colorless 1/1 colorless Hero creature tokens. You gain 3 life.
---
If an effect you control would create a token, it creates twice that many tokens instead.

card.name: Crystalline Array // Decisive Fate
card.text:
You may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to activate nonmana abilities.
---
{W}{W}{U}{U}{B}{B}{R}{R}{G}{G}: Target player wins the game. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Desert Racetrack // Hairpin Turn
card.text:
At the beginning of your end step, create a 2/2 green Bird creature token with "Whenever a land you control enters, this token gets +1/+0 until end of turn."
---
At the beginning of your end step, untap all creatures you control.

card.name: Thorny Clearing // Mogscourt
card.text:
Up to one creature can attack or block each combat if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)
---
Whenever a creature you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Rhotano Scoundrel
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, remove a counter from target battle, creature, or planeswalker. If a counter is removed from a permanent you control this way, draw a card.

card.name: Spectral Morpho
card.text: This creature can't be blocked if you activated a nonmana ability this turn. {U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Imperfect Gentleman
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, create an Aether token for each creature in your party. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Wyrmwing Channeler
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, draw a card. Flow — {3}{W}: This creature gets +2/+2 and gains flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Surecast Manipulator
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Rogue[/b] | Whenever this creature attacks, tap target creature you don't control. [b]Wizard[/b] | Whenever this creature attacks, untap target creature you control.

card.name: Star Calling
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token and draw a card. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dragonsbane Dervish
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may remove a counter from a battle, creature, or planeswalker. If you do, put a shield counter on this creature if it doesn't already have one. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Faetouched Vagabond
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. Whenever this creature attacks, up to one target creature gets -1/-0 for each creature in your party until end of turn.

card.name: Adamantoise
card.text: Vigilance Flow — {2}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Waterfall Sprites
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") If one or more counters would be put on this creature, instead add {C}.

card.name: Inconsistent Connection
card.text: Flash When this Aether enters, counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Indigo Whorl
card.text: This spell costs {1} less for each creature that is attacking you or a permanent your are defending. Creatures get -6/-0 until end of turn.

card.name: Gone Fishing
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand if it's a creature or if you activated a nonmana ability this turn.

card.name: Adloquium
card.text: Choose target creature you control. Put a +1/+1 counter and a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Looking for Help
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature in your party. (Your party consists of up to one of each of Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard.) Draw three cards.

card.name: Trained Aesthetician
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may remove a counter from a battle, creature, or planeswalker. If you do, this creature can't be blocked this turn. {1}: Target creature you control gets your choice of +1/-1 or -1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Cerulean Adept
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Rogue[/b] | The first artifact or enchantment spell you cast each turn costs {2} less to cast. [b]Wizard[/b] | The first instant or sorcery spell you cast each turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Ominous Shoebill
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control attack and aren't blocked, look at the top four cards of your library. Put them back in any order. {2}{U}: Target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Tideglider
card.text: Flying When you activate a nonmana ability, you may create an Aether token. Do this only once each turn. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Crystalline Brigand
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature for each creature in your party. They don't untap on their controller's next untap step.

card.name: Calamity Augur
card.text: This creature can block as though it were untapped. Flow — {3}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Cancerous Threat
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among cards in your graveyard. At the beginning of your upkeep, discard a card. Draw a card.

card.name: Iridescent Fantasia
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it isn't legendary. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Whirlwind Denial
card.text: For each spell and ability your opponents control, counter it unless its controller pays {4}.

card.name: Recruit a Friend
card.text: This spell costs {1} less for each creature in your party. (Your party consists of up to one of each of Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard.) Gain control of target permanent.

card.name: Records from Another World
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, draw three cards. Put two cards from your hand on top of your library. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Aetherflow
card.text: Until end of turn, you may tap your creatures and enchantments as you cast noncreature spells or activate abilities. Each permanent tapped this way pays for {1}. Create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Ironworks Engineer
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Rogue[/b] | Nonmana abilities you activate cost {2} less to activate. This can't reduce the mana in those costs to less than one mana. [b]Wizard[/b] | {9}: Draw three cards.

card.name: Matriarch of the Depths
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever this creature becomes tapped as you cast a spell or activate an ability, copy that spell or ability. You may choose new copies for the copy.

card.name: Merlwyb, Storm Admiral
card.text: When this creature enters, put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Whenever an attacking creature you control deal combat damage to a permanent, draw a card.

card.name: Bottomless Crags
card.text: Whenever this Primal enters or you attack with one or more Gods, each opponent turns a creature they control face down. They become artifacts with "{2}: Turn this artifact face up." {U}{U}: This enchantment becomes a legendary God creature in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Octomammoth
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") {U}, Sacrifice an Aether token: Exile target creature. Return that creature to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Marilye, Veiled Deceiver
card.text: When this planeswalker enters, if you cast it, create a token that's a copy of target permanent. [0]: Whenever a creature attacks and isn't blocked this turn, draw a card and put a loyalty counters on each planeswalker you control. [-4]: Exchange control of two target nonland permanents with different controllers. [-6]: You get an emblem with "Whenever you activate a nonmana ability, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy."

card.name: Dream in Ice
card.text: Each player chooses a party from among creatures they control, then returns the rest to their owner's hands. (Your party consists of up to one of each of Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard.)

card.name: Whalaqee Gambit
card.text: When this Aether enters, draw a card. Whenever you draw a card, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Nymian Remnants // Floating Isles
card.text:
Whenever you activate a nonmana ability, you may pay {1}. If you do, draw a card.
---
{1}{U}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Sastasha Seagrot // Flooded Cove
card.text:
Whenever a creature you control attacks and isn't blocked, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.
---
Each creature you don't control gets -1/-0.

card.name: Relict Tower // Pharos Sirius
card.text:
{2}: Create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")
---
Spells your opponents cast that target you or a permanent you control cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Syrcus Tower // Allagan Records
card.text:
When this side is cleared, create a token that is a copy of another target permanent, except it isn't legendary.
---
Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, search your library for a card with the same name, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle.

card.name: Corrupted Child
card.text: Flying This creature gets +1/+1 while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Awaiting Orders
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove a counter from a battle, creature, or planeswalker you control or pay {1}. Each opponent loses 2 life. Amass 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)

card.name: Holy See Renegade
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, each opponent loses 1 life for each creature in your party. You gain 1 life for each creature in your party.

card.name: Conscripted Fodder
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Whenever one or more counters are removed from this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Doman Shadow
card.text: Flash Whenever this creature deals damage to a permanent, remove all counters from that permanent.

card.name: Carteneau Mercenary
card.text: When this creature enters, you may remove a counter from target battle, creature, or planeswalker. Whenever one or more counters are removed from a permanent you control, you may draw a card. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Prowling Huntress
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Rogue[/b] | Whenever this creature attacks, it gets deathtouch until end of turn. [b]Warrior[/b] | Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Garlean Magitek
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you lose 1 life and amass 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.) Crew 4 (Tap creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Forsaken Soul
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card. Repeat this process once if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Tainted Experiments
card.text: Menace Creatures blocking this creature get -1/-1 while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Inevitable End
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Destroy target battle, creature, or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Lost to the Lifestream
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Exile all creature cards in all graveyards that were put there from the battlefield this turn. If a creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Duress
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Gelmorran Rite
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, return target creature and/or planeswalker cards from your graveyard to your hand. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Live in Darkness
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a shield counter on it." (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Silent Diremite
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature dies, each player discards a card. Each opponent that didn't discard a card this way loses half their life, rounded down.

card.name: Bright Eye Familiar
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each card in your graveyard and has menace while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Eastern Decurio
card.text: When this creature enters, you may remove a counter from a battle, creature, or planeswalker you control. If you do, amass 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)

card.name: Life for Empire
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature. Amass 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)

card.name: Lost Hope Corsair
card.text: This creature can't block. Whenever this creature attacks a permanent, put a shield counter on this creature. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Praefectus Executioner
card.text: Army creatures you control get +2/+2. When this creature enters, remove a counter from any number of battles, creatures, and planeswalkers. For each counter removed this way, amass 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)

card.name: Decorated Adventurer
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, draw a card for each creature in your party. You lose that much life.

card.name: Futures Forfeit
card.text: Exile target battle, creature, or planeswalker. Until end of turn, you may play a battle card exiled this way, and mana of any type can be spent to cast it.

card.name: Hallucinogenic Halitosis
card.text: Remove all counters from target creature or planeswalker. For each different kind of counter removed this way, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Touch of the Black Rose
card.text: Choose a card name. Search target player's graveyard, hand, and library for up to four cards with that name and exile them. Then that player shuffles.

card.name: At Any Cost
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may remove a counter from any number of battles, creatures, and planeswalkers you control. This spell costs {1} less for each counter removed this way. Return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Megalomaniac
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, up to one target creature gets -1/-1 for each creature in your party.

card.name: Remastered Chopper
card.text: Whenever one or more counters are removed from permanents you control, you may return this Vehicle from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Crew 1 (Tap creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Armored Vigilante
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Rogue[/b] | This creature can't be blocked as long as it is attacking a permanent. [b]Warrior[/b] | Pay X life: This creature gets +X/-X until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Gaius, Sable Legatus
card.text: If a nontoken creature an opponent controls would die, instead exile it. Amass 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.) {3}{B}, Remove a counter from a battle, creature, or planeswalker you control: Target creature you don't control gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Death Blossom
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Whenever one or more counters are removed from a battle, creature, or planeswalker you control, you may destroy target creature. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Heart of Sabik
card.text: Whenever this Vehicle enters or attacks, each opponent sacrifices an enchantment and a creature. Create a token that's a copy of a permanent sacrificed this way. Crew 5 (Tap creatures you control with total power 5 or more: This becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Stygian Visage
card.text: When you cast this spell while your enmity is twelve or greater, return all creatures from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.) Flying

card.name: Umbral Era
card.text: All creatures get -3/-3 until end of turn. At the beginning of the next end step, choose up to one creature card that was put into your graveyard from the battlefield this turn. Return that card to its owner's hand.

card.name: Pureheart Desperation
card.text: You lose 3 life and draw three cards. Then if your enmity is twelve or greater, each opponent loses 3 life and discards three cards. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Heretic Hideout // Heretic Hideout
card.text:
An additional creature must be assigned for attacking creatures you control to be blocked.
---
When this side is cleared, each opponent sacrifices a creature or a planeswalker.

card.name: Carteneau Flats // Supply Camp
card.text:
When this side is cleared, amass 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)
---
If you would amass any amount, instead amass that much plus 1.

card.name: Haukke Foyer // Empty Hallways
card.text:
When this side is cleared, put target creature card or planeswalker card from your graveyard onto the battlefield.
---
At the beginning of each player's end step, they discard a card if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Dun Scaith // Corrupted Gate
card.text:
At the beginning of your end step, each opponent gains loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
---
When this side is cleared, you control target opponent during their next turn.

card.name: Miner Problems
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it if you activated a nonmana ability this turn.

card.name: Company Recruitment
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, amass 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.) Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Coliseum Cyclone
card.text: Whenever a battle you control enters or is defeated, untap this creature. {T}: Add {C}. If your enmity is twelve or greater, instead add {C}{C}{C}. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Relay Runners
card.text: This creature enters tapped. {1}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Search your library for a card with the same name as it, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle. Activate only if you attacked this turn.

card.name: Unstable Nucleus
card.text: Reach When this creature enters or dies, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Maverick Officer
card.text: When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to each opponent if one or more counters were removed from permanents you control this turn.

card.name: Brotherhood of Ash
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature can't block this turn. Whenever you attack a permanent, you may discard a card. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: To the Races
card.text: Create two 2/2 green Bird creature tokens with "Whenever a land you control enters, this token gets +1/+0 until end of turn."

card.name: Mhigan Sellswords
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Rogue[/b] | Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +2/+0 until end of turn. [b]Warrior[/b] | Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Frenzied Marauder
card.text: Trample Other creatures you control have trample if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Devastating Blow
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage to target permanent. Create a number of Aether tokens equal to the amount of excess damage dealt this way. (Enchantments with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Battle High
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, up to one target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Piercing Volley
card.text: This spell deals 1 damage to each battle you control and each creature you don't control.

card.name: Coordinated Assault
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Flow — {2}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Strike Out
card.text: Discard two cards. Draw two cards. Add {C}{C}. You may spend this mana as though it were mana of any type.

card.name: Dravanian Hunter
card.text: This creature has double strike while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.) {2}{R}: This creature gets +2/+0 and gains reach until end of turn.

card.name: Battleworn Skirmisher
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, you may remove a counter from a battle, creature, or planeswalker you control. If you do, that creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: War Panther
card.text: When this creature enters, sacrifice an Aether. If you can't, return this creature to its owner's hand and create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Dravanian Flamewing
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack with one or more Birds, you may pay {R}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. Return it to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: New Alliances
card.text: Amass 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.) Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Cavalry Drake
card.text: Creatures you control have haste while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.) {R}: Damage can't be prevented this turn. This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Alliance Commander
card.text: You may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast battle spells. When this creature enters, search your library for a battle card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle.

card.name: Piercing Note
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.) This spell deals 4 damage to target permanent.

card.name: Supernatural Temptation
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, gain control of target creature. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Gathering Power
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a permanent this turn, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") Draw a card.

card.name: Pair Up
card.text: Choose two target creatures you control. They each get +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the base power of the other. They each gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Volatile Pyre
card.text: Whenever this Aether dies or at the beginning of each end step, this Aether deals 2 damage to each opponent. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Auspice of Rebirth
card.text: Whenever a Phoenix you control dies, create a 2/2 green Bird creature token with "Whenever a land you control enters, this token gets +1/+0 until end of turn." {2}{R}: Target Bird becomes a Phoenix in addition to its other types until end of turn.

card.name: Repurposed Cultivator
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token. Whenever this Vehicle enters or attacks, discard a card. Draw a card. Crew 1 (Tap creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Raubahn, Mhigan Champion
card.text: Each creature you control can attack permanents as though they had haste. This creature gets +X/+X while your enmity is twelve or greater, where X is the total mana value of permanents you control. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Smoldering Bowl
card.text: Whenever this Primal enters or you attack with one or more Gods, if a source you control would deal damage this turn, instead it deals that much damage plus 2. {R}{R}: This enchantment becomes a legendary God creature in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Imperial Allegiant
card.text: Whenever this creature enters, amass 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.) {2}{R}, Remove a counter from another battle, creature, or planeswalker you control: Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: New World Tyrant
card.text: Flying, trample Whenever a battle you control is defeated, this creature deals damage equal to its power to each opponent.

card.name: Flames of Rebellion
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove a counter from any number of battles, creatures, or planeswalkers you control. This spell costs {1} less for each counter removed this way. This spell deals X damage to any target.

card.name: Beyond the Source
card.text: Whenever this Aether or another enchantment enters, you may have that enchantment become a copy of target creature you control until end of turn, except it isn't legendary and has haste. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Alliance Raid // Operation Archon
card.text:
Whenever you attack a battle, amass 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)
---
If you would amass any amount, you may instead put that many +1/+1 counters on a creature you control and add one mana of any color.

card.name: Echoing Roars // Wyrm Memories
card.text:
Creatures you control have double strike if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)
---
When this side is cleared, untap all creatures you control. If it's your combat or main phase, there is an additional combat phase after this phase.

card.name: Ruby Avenue // Salvage Shop
card.text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.
---
When this side is cleared, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, search your library for a land card and put it onto the battlefield. Shuffle.

card.name: Chocobo Nest // Collateral Damage
card.text:
Discard two cards: Create a 2/2 green Bird creature token with "Whenever a land you control enters, this token gets +1/+0 until end of turn."
---
When this side is cleared, it deals 4 damage to up to one other target.

card.name: Seedseer Devotee
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Flow — {7}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Invested Novice
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn. Flow — {2}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Dodo of Paradise
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest back on top in any order.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Hearty Highlander
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, untap a land you control. If your enmity is twelve or greater, instead untap all lands you control. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Serene Sentinel
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Cleric[/b] | Spells your opponents cast that target this creature cost {2} more to cast. [b]Warrior[/b] | Spells you cast that target this creature cost {2} less to cast.

card.name: Invasive Boar
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, you may play an additional land this turn. When this creature dies, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Twelveswood Ascetic
card.text: When this creature enters, put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Flow — {2}{W}: This creature gets +1/+1 for each permanent you control with a counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Distant Traveler
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature in your party.

card.name: Ehcatl Brightfeather
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, return a permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Repeat this process once if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Scion Gathering
card.text: When this Aether enters, create three 1/1 colorless Hero creature tokens. Then put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Expedition Hijinks
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counters on target creature you control for each creature in your party. When you do, that creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one target permanent. (Your party consists of up to one of each of Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard.)

card.name: Sudden Inspiration
card.text: Untap target creature you control. lt gets +3/+3 until end of turn. Damage dealt by it can't be prevented this turn.

card.name: Return to Nature
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Unexpected Vistas
card.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards and reveal them. Put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand. Shuffle. Flow — {2}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Viridan Blessing
card.text: When this Aether enters, put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Adventurous Chocobo
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. {2}{G}: Reveal the top three cards of your library. You may put a permanent card revealed this way into your hand. Put the on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Qiqirn Junkmongers
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, put a land card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Idyll Paragon
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Cleric[/b] | This creature gets +0/+1 for each other creature you control. [b]Warrior[/b] | This creature deals combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Orchard Keeper
card.text: Flow — {2}{W}: Return target permanent card in your graveyard to your hand if it was put there from the battlefield this turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Sharlayan Specialist
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token for each creature in your party.

card.name: Weathered Veteran
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be done to this creature if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Spriggan Hoarder
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) When this creature enters, exile target artifact or enchantment you don't control until this creature leaves the battlefield. You may cast that card as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell.

card.name: Bramble Enforcer
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Cleric[/b] | This creature gets +1/+1 for each permanent you control with a counter on it. [b]Warrior[/b] | This creature gets +1/+1 for each permanent you control with a counter on it.

card.name: Steppe Mistress
card.text: When you cast this spell while your enmity is twelve or greater, search your library for a permanent card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.) The first creature spell you cast on each of your turns costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Choose Your Weapon
card.text: Choose one — • Double target creature's power and toughness until end of turn. • This spell deals 5 damage to target creature with flying.

card.name: Come Together
card.text: For each creature in your party, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Those creatures gain trample until end of turn. (Your party consists of up to one of each of Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard.)

card.name: Stillglade Bloom
card.text: When this Aether enters or dies, you gain 3 life. Add one of any color. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sanctuary Companion
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Cleric[/b] | {1}: Add one mana of any color. You gain 1 life. Activate only once each turn. [b]Warrior[/b] | {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Creatures you control get +5/+5 until end of turn.

card.name: Sylvan Warden
card.text: When this creature enters, you may play an additional land this turn. If you tap a permanent for mana while your enmity is twelve or greater, it produces two times as much of that mana instead. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Senna, Seedseer Matron
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token. Flow — {1}{G}: You may play an additional land this turn. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Tempestuous Eye
card.text: Whenever this Primal enters or you attack with one or more Gods, create a 2/2 green Bird creature token with "Whenever a land you control enters, this token gets +1/+0 until end of turn." {G}{G}: This enchantment becomes a legendary God creature in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Limber Forerunner
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 for each creature in your party and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Overgrown Morbol
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Other creatures lose all abilities and can't gain abilities. Cards in graveyards lose all abilities and can't gain abilities.

card.name: Quieting Winds
card.text: Exile all artifacts, battles, and enchantments. Abilities that would be triggered by those permanents leaving the battlefield don't trigger this turn.

card.name: Sanctuary Menagerie
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nonland permanent. Search your library for any number of nonland permanent cards with total mana value equal to or less than the mana value of the sacrificed permanent minus {1}, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Fallgourd Float // Frontier Vista
card.text:
{5}{G}: Reveal the top three cards of your library. Put up to one creature card revealed this way onto the battlefield and the rest into your graveyard.
---
When this side is cleared, search your library for up to two basic land cards and put them onto the battlefield tapped. Shuffle.

card.name: Sylvan Thicket // Moonspore Grove
card.text:
When this side is cleared, return target card in your graveyard to your hand.
---
Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Jungle Longstop // Vibrant Respite
card.text:
If you would put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control, instead put twice that many counters on it.
---
When this side is cleared, put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Seal Rock // Skirmish Point
card.text:
When this side is cleared, put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)
---
Whenever you put one or more counters on a creature you control, you may draw a card. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: K'lyhia, Arcane Novice
card.text: Untap this creature during each opponent's untap step. Flow — {2}{W}{U}: Copy the next nonmana ability you activate this turn. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Novv, Clutch Father
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a permanent, each opponent exiles a card from their hand. You may play cards exiled by this creature, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast spells this way.

card.name: Livia, Scorned Tribunus
card.text: When this creature enters, amass 3. (Put three +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.) {3}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: This creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hoary, Tested Mettle
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. Creatures you control have haste while your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Coultenet, Tested Mercy
card.text: Token creatures you control may attack as though they were untapped. Flow — {X}{G}{W}: Create a tapped 1/1 colorless Hero creature token. It enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Hildibrand, Extraordinaire
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, you may create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token. Do this only once each turn unless your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.) {W}{B}: Put target card in a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: G'raha, Allagan Heir
card.text: When this creature enters, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") {X}: Until end of turn, target artifact or enchantment you control loses its types and becomes a Hero creature with base power and toughness X/X. X can't be 0.

card.name: Arenvald, Scion Recruit
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. Whenever a battle you control enters, remove two defense counters from it for each creature in your party.

card.name: Sezul, Forsaken Pioneer
card.text: When this creature enters, discard your hand. Draw three cards. Once during each of your turns, you may play a land card or cast a spell from your graveyard if a Bird you control entered the battlefield this turn

card.name: Yoshida, Wandering Minstrel
card.text: This creature is also a Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard. This creature gets +1/+1 for each creature in your party. {T}: Add {C} for each creature in your party.

card.name: Urianger, Divine Chronicler
card.text: Heroes you control are also Wizards. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, untap up to two target Wizards. Flow — {3}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. This mana can't be spent to cast creature spells. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Thancred, Dreaming Blade
card.text: Heroes you control are also Rogues. This creature gets +1/+0 for each other attacking Rogue you control. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to this creature this turn. This ability trigger only once each turn.

card.name: Nero, Scaevan Hammer
card.text: Whenever a counter is removed from one or more permanents you control, you may amass 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.) {1}{B}{R}, Sacrifice another creature: This creature deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Yda, Masked Pugilist
card.text: Heroes you control are also Warriors. Damage can't be prevented. {R}{G}: Target Warrior you control must be blocked this turn if able. Activate only if your enmity is twelve or greater. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Y'shtola, Lifestream Healer
card.text: Heroes you control are also Clerics. Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on target Cleric you control. Flow — {3}: This creature gains lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}.)

card.name: Heiress of Haukke
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your upkeep, you may reveal the top card of your library if your enmity is twelve or greater. If you do, you gain life equal to that card's mana value and put it into your hand. (Enmity is the total mana value of your permanents.)

card.name: Dreadwyrm Essence
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") Whenever you sacrifice one or more Aether, add one mana of any color. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Failed Encounter
card.text: Exile target permanent you don't control with mana value 4 or less. Its controller searches their library for a basic land card and puts it onto the battlefield. They shuffle.

card.name: Flight of the Dezul Qualan
card.text: Untap target creature that attacked this turn. It gets +1/+1 for each Bird you control and gains flying until end of turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Savage Raider
card.text: Discipline (This creature gains abilities from its types. Whenever it enters or you put a counter on it, it gains your choice of these types.) [b]Cleric[/b] | Other Clerics you control get +2/+2. [b]Rogue[/b] | Other Rogues you control get +2/+2. [b]Warrior[/b] | Other Warriors you control get +2/+2. [b]Wizard[/b] | Other Wizards you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Wind-Up Flock
card.text: Flow — {4}: Surveil 2. (Each creature you tap while activating this pays for {1}. To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest back on top in any order.)

card.name: Basalt Amalgam
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you activated a nonmana ability this turn. When this creature enters, create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") {T}: Add {C}{C}{C}.

card.name: Company Airship
card.text: Flying {T}: Add one mana of any color. Crew 1 (Tap creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Tonberry Knife
card.text: When equipped creature becomes blocked, sacrifice this Equipment. When you do, this Equipment deals 9999 damage to each creature blocking equipped creature. Equipped creature gets +2/+0. Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Crossroads Caravan
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, create two 2/2 green Bird creature tokens with "Whenever a land you control enters, this token gets +1/+0 until end of turn." Crew 4 (Tap creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Meteor Golem
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy target nonland permanent an opponent controls.

card.name: Icarus Engine
card.text: Equipped creature has flying. Whenever equipped creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Soul Crystals
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {4}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each creature in your party. (Your party consists of up to one of each of Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard.)

card.name: Nullstone Refraction
card.text: If a player would create a token, they instead create an Aether token. (An enchantment with "Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.") {2}, Sacrifice an Aether: Draw a card.

card.name: Lunar Facsimile
card.text: Hero creatures can't block. If your life total would change any amount, instead amass that amount. (Put that many +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. If you don't have one, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)

card.name: Cid Garlond
card.text: The "legend rule" doesn't apply to permanents you control. [+2]: Add {C} for each legendary permanent you control. This mana can't be spent to cast nonlegendary spells from your hand. [+2]: Discard a card. Draw a card. [-3]: You may play a permanent card from your graveyard this turn. Legendary spells cast this way can't be countered.

card.name: Tupsimati
card.text: As this Equipment enters, choose up to X creature types. Equipped creature is the chosen creature types in addition to their other types. It gets +1/+0 for each of its creature types, up to a maximum of +12/+0. Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Hall of the Novice
card.text: Whenever you cast a creature spell with discipline, you may pay {1}. If you do, that creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it. {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Ice Path
card.text: This land enters tapped. As this land enters, choose a color. You may spend {C} as though it were mana of the chosen color. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: The Mothercrystal
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. When this Aether dies, search your library for a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped. Shuffle. Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bird EOR
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Aether EOR
card.text: Sacrifice two Aether: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Marilye, Veiled Deceiver EOR
card.text: Whenever you activate a nonmana ability, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.
